Hero.description: FungiPower strengthens the natural cycle of the mycelium. Through the mycelium network, trace elements are efficiently transported to the fruiting bodies, resulting in uniform growth, faster harvest and higher yield per m². Developed and validated in commercial mushroom cultivation.

GrowerFocus.title: We change nothing
GrowerFocus.description: Your cultivation process is the foundation of your success. FungiPower is developed to strengthen this foundation, not replace it. We provide biological support for stable mycelium development and consistent flushes, in every phase of the cultivation cycle.

usps.title: Your method remains leading
usps.desc: No adjustments to your existing process needed. FungiPower integrates seamlessly into any growing operation.

usps.title: Keep doing what you're good at
usps.desc: FungiPower strengthens the biological cycle in the background.

reviews.name: Mushroom Grower
reviews.text: Since adding FungiPower to our cultivation schedule, we see a clear difference: more uniform fruiting bodies, faster flushes and higher yield per m². Without changing anything in our substrate.

reviews.name: Mushroom Grower
reviews.text: What appeals to me is that FungiPower doesn't just give results, it truly strengthens the mycelium. Less loss, better absorption, and 100% natural. Exactly what the sector needs.

ProblemSection.title: The challenge in
ProblemSection.description: In an ideal growing cycle, the mycelium colonises fully and all nutrients in the substrate are used efficiently. The reality is different. Uneven colonisation, slow flushes and inconsistent fruiting bodies lead to waste and lower yield per cycle.
ProblemSection.quote: "It is not the substrate that is the problem, but the efficiency with which the mycelium absorbs and utilises the available nutrients."
ProblemSection.closing: By strengthening the biological cycle of the mycelium with FungiPower, you get more yield out of every substrate block.

About.metaDesc: FungiPower was born from the practice of Jan Klerken — a deep understanding of how a cultivation truly develops, combined with scientific validation.
About.heroDesc: Born from pure practical experience and a deep understanding of how a cultivation truly develops.
About.visionDesc: Jan Klerken grew up in the mushroom world. What for others is a product was his daily reality. Over the years he worked in various parts of the chain and saw how the sector became more professional and technical. What always remained central is the role of the grower — ultimately everything revolves around the person who bears daily responsibility for quality and continuity.
About.coreDesc: Modern mushroom cultivation faces major challenges. Raw materials are becoming scarcer and more expensive, while demands on quality and yield only increase. Growers must work increasingly efficiently to remain profitable in a competitive market. In this development, improvement is often not about adding more, but about optimising what is already present.
About.approachDesc: FungiPower is the result of a strategic collaboration between FungiPower and Ourcelia. This joint venture combines two worlds: Ourcelia's in-depth biological expertise as a producer of quality spawn, and FungiPower's years of sector experience. By linking practical validation to the daily reality of the growing facility, we have developed a nutrient transporter that truly makes an impact where it counts: in the growing cell.

values.title: Data & Practice
values.desc: Validated through 20 field trials in commercial mushroom cultivation.

values.title: Stable Results
values.desc: Proven effectiveness that increases yield without disrupting cultivation.

About.whoWeAreDesc: "A more vital cultivation and a more stable flush, ultimately resulting in higher yield per growing cycle. Not by changing the system, but by making it function better."
About.productionDesc: We believe that progress should feel logical. When technology aligns well with the craft, it strengthens the grower's work rather than replacing it. That is what FungiPower stands for.
productionPoints: Sector Reality: understanding of the work floor and daily cultivation management

FAQ.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED
FAQ.metaDesc: Frequently asked questions about FungiPower biostimulants, usage, and partnership opportunities.

items.a: FungiPower is a natural biostimulant that strengthens the biological cycle of the mycelium. It promotes the absorption of trace elements through the mycelium network, resulting in uniform fruiting bodies, faster flushes and higher yield per m².

items.q: How often should I apply FungiPower?
items.a: For optimal results, we recommend application per growing cycle. Consult product information for specific dosages per growing phase.
No, it's a biostimulant that enhances existing fertilizers.

items.q: Can I use it with other fertilizers?
items.a: Yes, it works synergistically with all standard programs.

FungiPower strengthens mycelium network activity and promotes the absorption of essential nutrients in the substrate, resulting in more vital mycelium, more uniform colonisation and more stable flushes.
FungiPower Start is available in 1 liter, 10 liter, and 1000 liter. FungiPower Boost is available in 1 liter and 5 liter. Custom quantities/packaging available upon request.

items.q: Which crops is FungiPower suitable for?
items.a: FungiPower is developed for professional mushroom cultivation, including Agaricus, Pleurotus and Shiitake. It works effectively on all common substrate types.

items.q: Is FungiPower safe to use in cultivation?
items.a: Yes, when used correctly FungiPower is completely safe for mushroom cultivation and supports the natural biological processes of the mycelium.
Higher yield, better quality, efficient fertilizer use.

items.q: Does FungiPower work on all substrate types?
items.a: Yes, FungiPower works effectively on all common substrate types in mushroom cultivation.
Yes, contributes to sustainability by reducing leaching.
The unique formulation that actively supports the biological cycle of the mycelium, improving the uptake of all essential nutrients for a more stable and productive cultivation.
Mix with water and apply via irrigation system.

Footer.desc: Started in the agricultural heart of Venlo, the Netherlands, now a leading solution for professional growers worldwide.

Cucumbers.metaDesc: Practical research results at Van Gog Kwekerijen. Independently validated by Eurofins Agro.

s1.title: VALIDATED
s1.desc: This report presents the results of a practical trial with FungiPower at Van Gog Kwekerijen CV. The dataset includes 65 independent laboratory measurements by Eurofins Agro Wageningen.

silicon.label: Silicon uptake doubled
silicon.desc: Silicon uptake efficiency increased from 48% to 94%.

siliconLeaf.label: +38% silicon in young leaves
siliconLeaf.desc: Silicon increased from 1.73 to 2.39 mmol/l in young plant sap.

phosphorus.label: Phosphorus uptake 11% → 86%
phosphorus.desc: The plant absorbed more phosphorus while the irrigation supply increased by 45%.

molybdenum.label: +61% molybdenum
molybdenum.desc: Molybdenum in young plant sap increased from 2.32 to 3.73 µmol/l.

molyOld.label: +88% Molybdenum in old leaves
molyOld.desc: Old plant sap increased from 4.27 to 8.00 µmol/l.

mobilization.label: Nutrient mobilization
mobilization.desc: Modified fulvic acids mobilize bound nutrients in the substrate, making them available to the root.

uptake.label: Enhanced root uptake
uptake.desc: Silicon strengthens root cell walls, promoting selective nutrient uptake.

rhizosphere.label: Rhizosphere activation
rhizosphere.desc: FungiPower stimulates microbial activity around the root, increasing availability of phosphate and trace elements.

s4.title: INDEPENDENTLY
s4.desc: Irrigation water and plant sap are sampled simultaneously by Eurofins Agro Wageningen — this is how we calculate exactly how much the plant absorbs.

iron.label: 65 independent measurements
iron.desc: Irrigation water and plant sap sampled simultaneously — conducted by Eurofins Agro Wageningen.

zinc.label: Uptake efficiency calculated
zinc.desc: Uptake efficiency calculated from plant sap analysis. This is how we measure the difference FungiPower makes.

s5.title: CUCUMBER
s5.captionText: FungiPower not only helps the plant absorb nutrients more efficiently, but also become more resilient to salt stress.

brix.label: +15.8% Brix
brix.desc: Brix increased from 4.95 to 5.73 in young plant sap.

exclusion.label: Selective ion exclusion
exclusion.desc: Na in young leaves −42%, Cl in young leaves −46%.

molyOld.label: +88% molybdenum
molyOld.desc: Old plant sap increased from 4.27 to 8.00 µmol/l.

s6.title: ALL12®
s6.desc: FungiPower is a nutrient transporter based on modified fulvic acids. While standard fulvic acid products transport three to four elements, FungiPower transports all twelve essential nutrients directly to the roots.

s-rapport.title: Field
s-rapport.desc: 65 independent laboratory measurements · irrigation water and plant sap analyses
s-rapport.quote: "The dataset from Van Gog Kwekerijen provides convincing evidence that FungiPower's ALL12® Technology measurably improves nutrient uptake in cucumber plants. The six key findings are consistent with four years of WUR research."
s-rapport.methodBase: Methodology: uptake efficiency calculated from plant sap analysis
s-rapport.methodStrong: Strongest evidence: Si, Zn, Cu (irrigation water stable)
s-rapport.sourceFooter: Eurofins Agro · 65 measurements · Van Gog Kwekerijen

cards.label: Phosphorus uptake
cards.sub: with 45% higher P input via irrigation

cards.label: Molybdenum in old plant sap
cards.sub: direct proof ALL12® · with lower Mo input

s-samenvatting.title: CONCLUSION
s-samenvatting.p1: The above results are based on 65 independent laboratory measurements conducted by Eurofins Agro Wageningen at Van Gog Kwekerijen in Helmond, the Netherlands. The dataset includes irrigation water and plant sap analyses of cucumber plants grown on rockwool substrate.
s-samenvatting.p2: The results demonstrate that nutrient uptake in cucumber plants measurably improves when using FungiPower. Multiple elements show a significant increase in uptake efficiency, while irrigation water input for these elements remained stable.
s-samenvatting.p3: The dataset of Van Gog Kwekerijen provides strong practical evidence for the efficacy of FungiPower's ALL12® Technology.

s7.title: RESULTS
s7.desc: Ready for the next step in crop optimization? Start today with FungiPower ALL12 and experience the difference in uptake and yield.
